title: Cycle Grid
description: An ultra-premium, hardware-accelerated 2D canvas simulation built around a high-frequency sub-pixel arcade grid engine. Operating cleanly in native browser environments, the platform implements fluid vector movement driven via sub-millisecond animation loop threads, precise multi-object pixel intersection checks validating crash configurations against boundaries or intersecting trails, an autonomous predictive scanning AI opponent that intercepts trajectories to prevent self-collision while trapping target vectors, and unified LocalStorage presets keeping record statistics intact.
